examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Previous reset token expired. Fix: Generated new password reset link.

examples.query: Cannot open department drive project folder due to missing security group.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Account missing required security group. Fix: Added correct access group to account and the folder opened.
Cause: VPN profile expired. Fix: Received updated profile and reconnected.
Cause: Reset token expired. Fix: Issued new reset email and removed expired token from account.

examples.query: Cannot connect to expired VPN profile from home.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: VPN profile expired. Fix: Received updated profile and reconnected.
Cause: Local printer mapping stale. Fix: Clear print queue and reinstall printer mapping.

examples.query: Account locked, unable to access email or portal.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Account was locked. Fix: Account unlocked and user able to sign in.

examples.query: Email inbox not loading in desktop Outlook app.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Outlook credential cache was cleared and account re-added. Fix: The mailbox now loads correctly.
Cause: Previous reset token expired. Fix: Generated fresh password reset link.

examples.query: Permission denied when opening shared team folder.
examples.top1_resolution: Cause: Account missing required security group. Fix: Added correct access group to account and the folder opened.
